name: Destino Indomable
short_description: In Destino Indomable, you're the hot new actress tasked with playing the main character in a telenovela! This is a wild visual novel inspired by the craziest Latin soap operas, filled with humor, drama, romance, horses, handsome men, Spanglish and slaps!
detailed_description:
Lights, camera, action!

In Destino Indomable, you're the hot new actress tasked with playing the main character in a telenovela! This is a wild visual novel inspired by the craziest Latin soap operas, filled with humor, drama, romance, horses, handsome men, Spanglish and slaps!

Customize your own character and complete 5 thrilling telenovela episodes!

All your choices will impact the story, how the characters treat you and even the ratings for the show! You may even discover gossip for the hottest cast members!

Uncover the mysteries in the Montenegro de la Vega Hacienda, get entangled in a crazy love triangle and drive the crowd crazy with the wildest show you can come up with!

Are you ready to take your part?

Features:

  • Telenovela themed visual novel: We're bringing all the magic and surreal elements from Latin telenovelas to the VN Genre!

  • Character popularity system: Depending on your actions, some characters may see more screen time. The more a character appears, the more the audience will love them!

  • Create the perfect lead actress: Play with your clothes, hairstyle, colors, accessories, body types and more!

  • Five romance paths: What's a good telenovela without some romance? Each character offers a plotline to discover. You'll learn a different piece of the mystery by seeing each of them!

  • Different endings: Your choices through the telenovela will shape the story, culminating in more than 5 vastly different endings. Heroes become villains, villains become heroes, people return from the death... it's a telenovela, anything goes!

  • Over 15 hours of story: This game is very vast and filled with little details to uncover. You may find a secret or two that you wouldn't in a different playthrough.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, Spanish - Spain
